title: cyathea coloradoana
intro: Cyathea coloradoana, also known as the Colorado tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Cyatheaceae. It is native to the Pacific coast of North America, and its medicinal properties lie in its ability to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, with its health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Cyathea coloradoana typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically as poultices.
